contacts.title: Chief Revenue Officer
contacts.painPointsSummary: Needs a tighter view of pipeline quality across SDR and AE teams because current forecasting swings too much week to week.

contacts.title: VP of Revenue Operations
contacts.painPointsSummary: Owns tooling, routing, and reporting and is actively looking to reduce manual dashboard work before the next board cycle.

contacts.title: Senior Director of Demand Generation
contacts.painPointsSummary: Needs clearer attribution on paid and partner channels so campaign budget decisions stop getting delayed by conflicting reports.

contacts.title: Director of Finance
contacts.painPointsSummary: Wants a stronger ROI case and has concerns about adding another recurring software line item without measurable efficiency gains.

contacts.title: Head of Sales Development
contacts.painPointsSummary: Needs faster follow-up workflows and better visibility into lead quality because rep productivity drops when routing gets messy.
